specific_question: By what percentage did the new CRM system increase sales team productivity?
answer: The new CRM system, introduced on February 8, 2024, has recorded an increase in the sales team's productivity by 23% compared to the same month of the previous year.
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
